result.summary: Found 3 visible issues: a major horizontal overflow/clipping problem, a major bottom navigation overlap, and a minor text typo in the tab labels.

issues.description: The top category row is clipped on the right, with the 'Hot Gam...' tab cut off instead of fully visible.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the carousel/container padding or enable proper horizontal scrolling so the full tab label can be seen without being cut off.

issues.description: The bottom fixed navigation bar overlaps the game grid, obscuring the lower row of game tiles and their details.
issues.suggestion: Add enough bottom padding/margin to the content area or reposition the fixed nav so page content is not hidden behind it.

issues.description: The navigation label 'Jacpots' appears to be misspelled or truncated.
issues.suggestion: Correct the label to 'Jackpots' and verify all tab text fits within its container.
